tasks.description: Expose a fold-safe additive mobility-variability feature group from currently excluded cached feature families nl sv pa fq and hr without changing default B1 v2-only behavior, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-011 FR-013 FR-014
tasks.acceptance: Default B0-B6 behavior remains unchanged; the additive group includes only nonclinical sensor-derived variability frequency asymmetry and harmonic-ratio families; missing required columns fail fast; ext and ix clinical/demographic interaction families remain excluded.

tasks.description: Add a strict-inductive B7 v2-plus-variability screening variant to run_baselines.py for T3 total-score evaluation, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-007 FR-009 FR-013 FR-014
tasks.acceptance: B7 is selectable by baseline id, reuses train-fold-only feature selection and LightGBM training, reports CCC calibration slope MAE Pearson r prediction variance and sample count, and does not alter B0-B6 outputs.

tasks.description: Add B7 support to the existing null-gate validation path using the repository leakage-check helpers, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-008 FR-013
tasks.acceptance: B7 null validation uses existing scrambled-label and canary-feature helpers where applicable, records unsupported checks explicitly, and fails fast on invalid evaluation setup.

tasks.description: Run the B7 T3 5-fold screening experiment remotely and capture the exploratory result artifact, mapping FR-007 FR-009 FR-012 FR-015
tasks.acceptance: Remote run completes via the repository remote workflow, result JSON is produced under results/, no full local test suite is run, and the result is labeled exploratory screening.

tasks.description: Run B7 leakage and null sanity validation remotely and decide whether B7 is screening-positive using SC-002 thresholds, mapping FR-007 FR-008 FR-009 FR-011 FR-015 SC-001 SC-002
tasks.acceptance: Decision compares CCC calibration slope MAE Pearson r prediction variance and sample count against B1_v2_only; B7 is positive only if CCC reaches at least 0.35 or improves by at least 0.08 absolute CCC with no leakage-check failure.

tasks.description: If B7 is screening-positive, create exactly one pre-registration record for confirmatory T3 LOOCV; otherwise record the negative result and close the variability-signal candidate, mapping FR-010 FR-015 SC-003 SC-004 SC-005
tasks.acceptance: Either one pre-registration artifact exists for a single confirmation run, or a negative-result note records why the candidate is closed without repeated tuning.
